_template: Copy this file, remove _template and _notes fields, fill in your values.
_notes_parents: Exactly two species IDs. Parent order does not matter at runtime.
_notes_chance: Between 0.0 and 1.0. 0.08 = 8% chance per breeding attempt when parents match.
_notes_modes: partialChance + fullChance must equal 1.0. PARTIAL = one allele mutates; FULL = both alleles mutate.
